records.name: Dream Extraction
records.description: A co-op extraction roguelite built around unstable dream zones, memory shards, and timed escape.
records.pitch: Players enter collapsing dream zones, gather memory shards, and decide when to escape.
records.playerFantasy: A co-op team braving surreal spaces for one more shard before the world collapses.
records.targetAudience: Players who enjoy cooperative extraction, roguelite risk decisions, and surreal exploration.
